nasb.text: Then King Jehoiakim sent men to Egypt: Elnathan the son of Achbor and certain men with him went into Egypt.

esv.text: Then King Jehoiakim sent to Egypt certain men, Elnathan the son of Achbor and others with him,

cnv.text: 約雅敬王打發人到埃及去，就是派亞革波的兒子以利拿單和一些人同到埃及去。

ccb.text: 约雅敬王便派亚革波的儿子以利拿单率随从去埃及捉拿他。
